org.docgene.model

Class AbstractAPI

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.AbstractLink
      • org.docgene.model.AbstractAPI
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ElementReference, ExternalLink, ParagraphElement, StyledElement
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    XMLDotNetAPI, XMLDoxygenAPI, XMLJavaAPI, XMLPythonAPI, XMLQtAPI

    public abstract class AbstractAPI
extends AbstractLink
    A general API link.
